prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Integrated Urgent Care Aggregate Data Collection primarily focuses on services operating in England, specifically related to NHS services. While similar services exist in Scotland, the data and statistics would not apply or accurately represent Scottish health services.
